title: ZXBrick Achievements
description: Review the published ZXBrick achievement list and how to use it in replay loops.
summary: Treat achievements as milestone anchors for short, measurable progress in replay sessions.

sections.heading: Available achievements
paragraphs: The current public site data includes milestone goals tied to game volume and brick completion milestones.

sections.heading: Use achievements in your schedule
paragraphs: Pick one achievement target per session.
Use short sessions to hit each target with focused goal consistency.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXBrick achievements
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements give ZXBrick players optional goals beyond a single run or match.
body: This matters because players often want a reason to revisit the game after learning the basics. Achievement goals add structure without changing the core arcade loop.
Players use this page after playing to understand which progress surfaces are supported and how achievements relate to regular sessions.
bullets: Connects repeat play to optional goals.
Keeps achievement wording tied to supported game behaviour.
Pairs naturally with leaderboards and tips.

image.caption: ZXBrick achievement artwork supports optional progression goals.
